content: {"file": "backend/api/routers/review.py", "summary": "This file contains an API endpoint for approving reviews in a job management system. It checks if the specified job exists and was run in review mode, then schedules background tasks to resume the job's progress towards ADO creation.", "rules": [{"name": "Review Approval Endpoint", "description": "Handles POST requests to approve a review for a specific job ID.", "conditions": ["Job must exist", "Job must be in review mode"], "actions": ["Raise HTTP 404 if job not found", "Raise HTTP 409 if job was not run in review mode", "Add background task to resume job after approval"]}], "dependencies": ["fastapi", "pydantic", "pipeline.runner"]}
